stemHtml: Which statement is true about the use of the Doppler effect in a Doppler VOR?

options.a: By using the Doppler effect it is possible to determine the range of the aircraft from the VOR station more accurately.
options.b: The Doppler effect is used to create a signal which is received by the aircraft’s VOR-receiver as an amplitude modulated signal.
options.c: The Doppler effect is used to create a signal which is received by the aircraft’s VOR-receiver as a frequency modulated signal.
options.d: By using the Doppler effect it is also possible to determine the aircraft’s approach speed to the VOR.
